title: The New Delhi E-Waste Management Model
description: A flowchart illustrating the key actors, processes, and challenges in New Delhi's e-waste management system.
relationships: Informal Sector collects ~95% of e-waste from Consumers through an extensive network
Formal Sector competes with Informal Sector for material but lacks volume
Government Policies (e.g., E-Waste Rules) aim to regulate the Informal Sector and empower the Formal Sector
Improper handling by Informal Sector leads to severe Environmental & Health Impacts
